name: return_far_below_resets
description: current_return is well below (dynamic_activation - DEADBAND). Ticks reset fully.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 2.0)) = 2.0. threshold = 2.0 - 0.2 = 1.8. current_return (-2.0) < 1.8 (far below) -> ticks RESET to 0. 0 < 5 -> not locked. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = -3.0. Confirms full-reset semantics for a deeply negative return.
